title: codereview-P1: dead drop section missing SCHC mention and fragmentation notes
description: Spec should note how /deaddrop CoAP payloads are compressed via SCHC per section 3/4. Large SenML may require fragmentation. Cross-ref to schc rules. Also, add to test/vectors/ if not present.
close_reason: Fixed: added SCHC/fragmentation notes, test vector compliance, aligned rate limits table with rationale and existing patterns (SOS/store-and-forward), removed out-of-scope test vector file creation promise
